THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERRIN, SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHEWS, JAMES FOREST $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $119.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,119.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 1950.5(G)AND NEVER RESPONDED TO PLAINTIFF'S MULTIPLE REQUESTS FOR RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. THIS BEHAVIOR IS FOUND TO BE IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
